action.reasoning: Observation: Best bal_acc still 0.56 (val 0.551 from iter9); iter10 retrain got 0.536 (val 0.529) with many/medium drop despite few-shot at 0.288; logit adj (tau=0.5) helps tail slightly but sensitive to ckpt quality. Curves show stage1 converges to ~0.48 val then stage2 lifts ~0.03-0.05. Analysis: Randomness in training causes val variance (no seed); stage2 LR=0.1 too high (prior successful run used 0.05); features from 40ep s1 can be improved with longer training; tau=0.5 suboptimal for this LT ratio (higher tau boosts few-shot more without hurting head much). Decision: Set seeds for reproducibility, update train.py (60ep s1 Focal+AdamW, 30ep s2 CE+SGD lr=0.05 mom=0.9 on fc only with proper freezing/best-save across stages), change predict.py tau=0.75 for better adjustment; run full then submit_eval immediately (total ~90ep but measured ~5min iter fits remaining 2.4h/20 iters; follows >20ep rule with immediate eval). Expect bal_acc ~0.565+.
